Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.AngularAcceleration

    • Uses of AngularAcceleration in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return AngularAcceleration 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.addAndReturnNew​(double value, AngularAccelerationUnit unit, AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angular acceleration value and unit and returns a new angular acceleration instance using provided unit.
      static AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.addAndReturnNew​(AngularAcceleration arg1, AngularAcceleration arg2, AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds two angular accelerations.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.addAndReturnNew​(AngularAcceleration a, AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds provided angular acceleration to current instance and returns a new angular acceleration.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, AngularAccelerationUnit unit, AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angular acceleration value and unit and returns a new angular acceleration instance using provided unit.
      static AngularAcceleration AngularAccelerationConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(AngularAcceleration input, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAccelerationFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine an angular acceleration value and unit.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(double value, AngularAccelerationUnit unit, AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided angular acceleration value and unit and returns a new angular acceleration instance using provided unit.
      static AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(AngularAcceleration arg1, AngularAcceleration arg2, AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
      Subtracts two angular accelerations.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(AngularAcceleration a, AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided angular acceleration to current instance and returns a new angular acceleration.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, AngularAccelerationUnit unit, AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided angular acceleration value and unit and returns a new angular acceleration instance using provided unit.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void AngularAcceleration.add​(AngularAcceleration a)
      Adds provided angular acceleration and updates current angular acceleration.

      Adds provided angular acceleration and stores the result into provided angular acceleration.

      Adds provided angular acceleration to current instance and returns a new angular acceleration.

      Converts an angular acceleration to provided output angular acceleration unit.

      Converts and updates an angular acceleration to requested output unit.

      Converts an angular acceleration to requested output unit.

      Converts an angular acceleration to requested output unit.

      Subtracts provided angular acceleration and updates current angular acceleration.

      Subtracts provided angular acceleration and stores the result into provided angular acceleration.
